articles.description: Thomas Tuchel's expanded England squad offers hope to forgotten men but shows problems before the World Cup, writes Phil McNulty.
articles.title: England squad: Thomas Tuchel's latest Three Lions squad analysed

articles.description: Trent Alexander-Arnold's omission from Thomas Tuchel's biggest England squad is the latest blow to his stop-start international career and casts huge doubt on his hopes of playing at the World Cup.
articles.title: Trent Alexander-Arnold's England World Cup hopes in doubt, so what now for Real Madrid defender?

articles.description: Former boxing world champion Ricky Hatton was found "unresponsive" at his home in September.
articles.title: Coroner 'not satisfied' Ricky Hatton intended to take own life

articles.description: Ronnie O'Sullivan creates more snooker history by making the sport's highest-ever professional break with a 153 at the World Open in Yushan.
articles.title: World Open: Ronnie O'Sullivan makes highest-ever professional break with historic 153

articles.description: England's Ashes review will not bring seismic change but it does signal the final chapter of the Bazball era, writes Stephan Shemilt.
articles.title: England cricket's Ashes review likely to retain status quo but Brendon McCullum in overtime

articles.description: Audi team principal Jonathan Wheatley leaves with immediate effect after an approach from Aston Martin.
articles.title: Jonathan Wheatley: Audi boss leaves with immediate effect amid link to Aston Martin

articles.description: Liverpool say they are "appalled and disgusted" by racist abuse directed towards defender Ibrahima Konate on social media.
articles.title: Ibrahima Konate: Liverpool 'disgusted' by racist abuse towards France defender

articles.description: All the latest Premier League news conferences as Eddie Howe, Arne Slot and Fabian Hurzeler speak before the final weekend before the international break.
articles.title: Premier League LIVE - team news and previews: Howe, Hurzeler and Slot speaking before weekend

articles.description: Tottenham goalkeeper Guglielmo Vicario will have surgery on a hernia problem, paving the way for Antonin Kinsky to return to the side.
articles.title: Tottenham: Guglielmo Vicario to have hernia surgery with Antonin Kinsky set to start against Nottingham Forest

articles.description: Wayne Rooney reflects on the qualities of his former midfield team‑mates and ranks them based on their ability, influence and impact at the highest level.
articles.title: The Wayne Rooney Show: Who are the best midfielders Rooney played with?
